common.description: Security champions are those who take responsibility for spreading the security culture in the organization. They are drivers for making security a natural part of developing, and they inspire others to join the journey towards a safer digital future.

main.title: Welcome to the security champion program
main.subtitle: Join the program and start earning points by doing security related activities, and climb the leaderboard to become the ultimate security champion.

cta.hintJoin: Join the program and show up in the leaderboard.
cta.hintLeave: You can leave the game at any time.

subtitles.active: Keep the shield charged by bringing in members.
subtitles.idle: Kick things off so that we can start growing security culture together.

addMember.title: Add new member, backend will find them for you

addPoints.title: Add amount of points to add to member, do know that there is no logic for value validation :D

SCData.title: Security champion data
SCData.subtitle: Here you can see data inform of a dashboards, in order to track how security champion program is doing.

error.generic: Something went wrong, try again later
